measurement_method: Byte size from the Hugging Face model tree API (https://huggingface.co/api/models/mradermacher/MiLMMT-46-4B-v0.1-GGUF/tree/main): MiLMMT-46-4B-v0.1.Q6_K.gguf = 3741376000 bytes = 3568.0542 MB. sha256 is the Hugging Face LFS object id (oid sha256) for that file, which is the SHA-256 of the file content; cross-checked against the host download via Python hashlib.sha256 (2026-06-01). Single-file GGUF, so package_size_mb == artifact_size_mb.
